crossRefs.label: Remove mirror holder and disconnect cord.

blocks.text: Inspect No. C10 (10A) fuse in sub fuse box for blown or disconnected connections before performing inspection.

1. Disconnect power mirror 14P coupler 2. Turn ignition to ON mode 3. Turn on the rear defroster/mirror heater switch and verify that there is battery voltage between terminal No. 6 of the 14-pin coupler and ground. 4. Confirm that there is continuity between the No. 11 terminal of the 14P coupler and ground. 5. Remove mirror holder and disconnect cord. 6. Check continuity between the No. 6 and No. 11 terminals of the 14-pin coupler and the two mirror holder cords.

refs.label: Remove mirror holder and disconnect cord.

items.text: If there is no battery voltage, check the following items
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
If battery voltage is present, step 4 go to (a place)
If there is no continuity, check the following items
Disconnection of black cord and terminal connections
Disconnection of black cord and terminal connections
If continuity exists, step 5 go to (a place)

items: Be careful not to scratch the door mirrors.

items.text: If there is continuity with either, Replace mirror holder
